channel.title: Test Product Feed TC_XML_005 to TC_XML_050
channel.description: XML test feed covering repeated nodes, special values, image links, similar node names and cross-column contamination.

item.title: Test Product - Duplicate Color Values
item.description: Product to test duplicate g:color node values.

item.title: Test Product - Empty Repeated Color Node
item.description: Product to test one valid and one empty g:color node.

item.title: Test Product - Missing Color Node
item.description: Product to test absence of g:color node.

item.title: Test Product - Size Order Preservation
item.description: Product to test that repeated g:size node order is preserved (L, M, S).

item.title: Test Product - Interleaved Repeated Nodes
item.description: Product to test interleaved g:color and g:size nodes; parser must group same nodes correctly.

item.title: Men's T-Shirt & Jeans
item.description: Product to test special characters (apostrophe and ampersand entity) in title.

item.title: Tom & Jerry
item.description: Product to test XML entity decoding — & must decode to &.

item.title: नमस्ते
item.description: Product to test UTF-8 Unicode title value (Hindi: Namaste).

item.title: Test Product - Long Description (1000 chars)
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. Sed ut perspiciatis, unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt, explicabo. Nemo enim ipsam voluptatem, quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit aut fugit, sed quia consequuntur magni dolores eos qui ratione voluptatem sequi nesciunt. Neque porro quisquam est, qui dolorem ipsum quia dolor sit amet consectetur adipiscing velit, sed quia non numquam eius modi tempora incidunt labore et dolore magnam aliquam quaerat.

item.title: Red, Blue Shirt
item.description: Product to test that a comma inside a node value is handled correctly and the value is not split.

item.title: Test Product - CDATA Description
item.description: This is a base description using CDATA to test CDATA handling in the standard description node.

item.title: Test Product - Ten Size Values
item.description: Product to test g:size node repeated 10 times.

item.title: Test Product A - Two Colors
item.description: TC_XML_017 Product A: should have exactly 2 colors (Red, Blue).

item.title: Test Product B - Three Colors
item.description: TC_XML_017 Product B: should have exactly 3 colors (Purple, Yellow, Orange).

item.title: Test Product A - Isolation Source (Red, Blue)
item.description: TC_XML_018 Product A: colors Red and Blue must not leak into Product B.

item.title: Test Product B - Isolation Target (Green only)
item.description: TC_XML_018 Product B: must contain only Green; verify Red and Blue from Product A do not appear here.

item.title: Test Product - Mixed Single and Repeated Nodes
item.description: Product to test single title node alongside two repeated g:color nodes.

item.title: Test Product - Unknown Custom Attribute Node
item.description: Product to test that an unknown/unsupported node does not affect supported node processing.

item.title: Test Product - Case Sensitivity in Node Names
item.description: Product to test case sensitivity: g:Color (capital C) vs g:color (lowercase c).

item.title: Test Product - Namespace Node Parsing
item.description: Product to test that the g: namespace-prefixed node g:color is parsed and mapped correctly.

item.title: Large Feed Template Product 001
item.description: Template product for large feed performance test (TC_XML_023). Duplicate with unique IDs to generate 1000 products.

item.title: Large Feed Sample Product 002
item.description: Large feed sample product 002 for TC_XML_023.

item.title: Large Feed Sample Product 003
item.description: Large feed sample product 003 for TC_XML_023.

item.title: Large Feed Sample Product 004
item.description: Large feed sample product 004 for TC_XML_023.

item.title: Large Feed Sample Product 005
item.description: Large feed sample product 005 for TC_XML_023.

item.title: Test Product - Feed Reprocessing Consistency
item.description: Product to verify repeated g:color values remain consistent after feed is uploaded and processed twice.

item.title: Test Product - Multiple Repeated Attributes
item.description: Product to test several simultaneously repeated nodes: Color(2), Size(3), Material(2).

item.title: Test Product - Cross-Node Contamination Check
item.description: Product to verify that g:color values never appear in the Size column and g:size values never appear in the Color column.

item.title: Test Product - Blank Color Node Between Valid Values
item.description: Product to test a blank g:color node sandwiched between two valid values (Red and Blue).

item.title: Test Product - XML CSV Parity Check
item.description: Product to verify XML and CSV feeds produce identical output for the same data.

item.title: Test Product - Random Node Order
item.description: Product to test that Size, ID, Color in non-standard order are all mapped correctly.

item.title: Test Product - Single Additional Image Link
item.description: Product to test a single g:additional_image_link node is mapped correctly.

item.title: Test Product - Two Additional Image Links
item.description: Product to test aggregation of two g:additional_image_link nodes.

item.title: Test Product - Five Additional Image Links
item.description: Product to test five g:additional_image_link nodes are all captured.

item.title: Test Product - Duplicate Additional Image Links
item.description: Product to test duplicate g:additional_image_link values are preserved.

item.title: Test Product - Empty Additional Image Link Node
item.description: Product to test one valid and one empty g:additional_image_link node.

item.title: Test Product - No Additional Image Link
item.description: Product to test feed processing when g:additional_image_link node is entirely absent.

item.title: Test Product A - Two Additional Images
item.description: TC_XML_037 Product A: 2 additional image links (037-a-img1, 037-a-img2).

item.title: Test Product B - Three Additional Images
item.description: TC_XML_037 Product B: 3 additional image links (037-b-img1, 037-b-img2, 037-b-img3).

item.title: Test Product - Additional Image Order Preservation
item.description: Product to test that g:additional_image_link URLs appear in output in the same order as in XML (img3, img1, img2).

item.title: Test Product - Main and Additional Image Separation
item.description: Product to verify image_link and g:additional_image_link are always stored in their respective separate columns.

item.title: Test Product - Twenty Additional Image Links
item.description: Product to test parser handling of 20 g:additional_image_link nodes.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S25
item.description: Product to verify title and g:short_title are read into separate columns.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra Edition
item.description: Product to test repeated title and repeated g:short_title nodes do not merge with each other.

item.title: Test Product - Description Separation
item.description: Full description of the product for TC_XML_043. This is the long description field used to verify it does not bleed into the short description column.

item.title: Samsung
item.description: Product to test title and g:short_title containing the identical value "Samsung" are populated independently without confusion.

item.title: Main Product Title
item.description: Product to test that the parser uses exact name matching and does not apply substring matching (title vs product_title vs short_title).

item.title: Title Value One
Title Value Two
item.description: Product to test that title aggregates only title values and g:short_title aggregates only its own values, with no cross-mixing.

item.title: Test Product - Image Node Separation
item.description: Product to verify image_link and g:additional_image_link are never mixed; each maps to its own separate column.

item.title: Test Product - Color and Color Family Separation
item.description: Product to test that g:color and g:color_family are stored in separate columns and do not contaminate each other.

item.title: Test Product - Common Prefix Node Names
item.description: Product to test that product_type and product_category (sharing the prefix "product_") are stored independently in separate columns.

item.title: Test Product - Full Cross-Column Contamination Validation
item.description: Full description for TC_XML_050 cross-column contamination validation test product.
